channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Dunedin Blue Jays debut 'rain delay jersey' featuring Tampa Bay weather radar this weekend
item.description: The Single-A Toronto affiliate faced 24 weather delays, six postponements, and 10 cancellations in 2025, so they decided to lean into it.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa Bay 28 Listens booth will be in St. Petersburg on July 20 and wants to hear from you
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 St. Petersburg and South Pinellas reporter Casey Albritton will be at the Speer YMCA on July 20, listening to you and the stories you think need to be covered in the area.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Rescuers still searching for 3 people after a boat sank in San Francisco Bay, leaving 1 dead
item.description: Rescuers were still searching for three people missing after a boat in a memorial service sank in the cold, fast-moving waters of San Francisco Bay near Alcatraz Island, authorities said Wednesday.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Area of low pressure at 20% chance of development: What this means for your weekend
item.description: The National Hurricane Center reported a small blob with a slight chance of formation that is expected to bring some rain this upcoming weekend.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump to become first sitting president on US currency with new $1 coin
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent unveiled a $1 coin featuring President Donald Trump to mark the nation’s 250th anniversary.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Florida schedules rare double execution on July 28
[BREAKING] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] No injuries in devastating Longboat Key structure fire
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Wine Down Wednesday: Brick’s Smoked Meats
[WATCHLIST: hurricane] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] National Hurricane Center watching an area just north of us
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] NHC monitoring tropical disturbance over Gulf, Florida and Atlantic coastal waters
[BREAKING] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Bradenton man arrested after fatal DUI crash kills Road Ranger
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida drivers beware: Operation Southern Slow Down is in play
[The Florida Channel] 7/15/26 Social Services Estimating Conference: KidCare Caseload
item.description: 7/15/26 Social Services Estimating Conference: KidCare Caseload first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/15/26 Social Services Estimating Conference: KidCare Caseload first appeared on The Florida Channel

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/13/26 Capitol Update Extended: Courts Addressing Threats to Judges
item.description: 7/13/26 Capitol Update Extended: Courts Addressing Threats to Judges first appeared on The Florida Channel Florida state courts start tracking threats made to Judges and create new positions to improve security. A judge from Dixie County got death threats for years before legal action could be taken. 7/13/26 Capitol Update Extended: Courts Addressing Threats to Judges first appeared on The Florida

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] England and Argentina resume fierce rivalry in the World Cup semifinals
item.description: One of soccer's greatest rivalries is back on the biggest stage. England and Argentina clash in the World Cup semifinals in Atlanta — who are you picking? ⚽🏆

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Hate the middle seat? United plans new Economy Plus alternative
item.description: United’s new Airbus jets will feature Economy Plus rows without middle seats, replacing them with fixed tables for extra space.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] RFK Jr. to visit Tampa General Hospital
item.description: The U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is coming to Tampa this week, according to Tampa General Hospital.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Caesar dressing is coming to McDonald’s menu for a limited time
item.description: McDonald’s is adding a limited-time Caesar dipping sauce and new Caesar chicken menu items, including wraps and sandwiches, beginning July 21.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lightning announce 2026-27 season home opener
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning announced the date and opponent for the 2026-2027 season home opener. The Lightning will open the season on the road against the New York Rangers on Oct. 1.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] National Hurricane Center tracks 20% development chance in Gulf
item.description: The National Hurricane Center is tracking a tropical disturbance in the northeastern Gulf that could bring heavy rain and flooding risks to Florida starting Saturday.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Small businesses urged to prepare for hurricane season with proper insurance coverage

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Health officials confirm tuberculosis case at Colorado ICE facility; ICE denies any active cases
item.description: Health officials say the facility has not provided "the information or access necessary" to complete the investigation and determine if there are additional cases.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Biden memoir set for November release amid debate over his legacy
item.description: “Promise Me, America,” Joe Biden’s new memoir, will revisit his presidency and decision to end his 2024 reelection campaign.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Faint new planet is revealed around a young star after a decade in hiding
item.description: Astronomers have discovered a faint, elusive planet orbiting a young star after more than a decade of cosmic hide-and-seek.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Taco Bell removes some ingredients during nationwide cyclospora investigation
item.description: Taco Bell removed select ingredients at some locations as health officials investigate a nationwide surge in cyclospora infections.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Pinellas Schools seeks public input on next phase of campus closures, consolidations
item.description: The Pinellas County School District is asking parents, staff and residents to help shape the district's next round of school closure and consolidation recommendations as leaders continue to respond to falling student enrollment and the rising cost of maintaining older campuses.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Westcoast Black Theatre Troupe debuts new Marvin Gaye revue ahead of international festival
